items.title: Castle Connolly profile needs insurance update
items.summary: Dr. Haas's Castle Connolly listing incorrectly shows he accepts insurance. He needs the profile corrected to reflect that neither he nor VYVE Wellness currently accepts insurance.
items.actionNeeded: Follow up to ensure Castle Connolly profile has been updated to reflect no insurance acceptance.

items.title: Vibrant Wellness partnership discussion scheduled
items.summary: Emma from Vibrant Wellness met with Emily about standalone pricing improvements and exploring collaboration opportunities leveraging Dr. Haas's peptide expertise. Meeting being scheduled through Yanina.
items.actionNeeded: Coordinate with Yanina to schedule meeting and prepare for discussion about Vibrant partnership opportunities.

items.title: VYVE Homepage messaging session tomorrow 5pm
items.summary: Influex rescheduled the homepage messaging and design meeting for June 24 at 5pm with Angela, Dmitriy, and Tariq attending.
items.actionNeeded: Attend or delegate attendance for tomorrow's 5pm homepage messaging and design session with Influex.

items.title: SEO/AEO alignment meeting with UPQODE scheduled
items.summary: Influex coordinated with UPQODE to align SEO and AEO efforts for VYVE Wellness. UPQODE's Val Pas confirmed availability to sync via Calendly.
items.actionNeeded: Review or delegate attendance for upcoming SEO/AEO alignment meeting between Influex and UPQODE.
